voiceCanvas.title: VoiceCanvas
voiceCanvas.subtitle: Real-time duplex voice interaction engine featuring low latency and expressive synthesis.
voiceCanvas.description: VoiceCanvas integrates Voice Activity Detection (VAD), Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), Large Language Model orchestration, and Text-to-Speech (TTS) synthesis into a unified, high-performance streaming pipeline. Built to support conversational agents that feel natural, mimicking human turn-taking and emotional response inflections.
voiceCanvas.systemPrompt: System: Click the microphone to start speaking with the Voice AI.

autonomousAgent.title: Autonomous Task Agent
autonomousAgent.subtitle: An autonomous agent that reasons, plans, and writes code to accomplish multi-step objectives.
autonomousAgent.description: Autonomous Task Agent utilizes advanced ReAct (Reasoning and Acting) prompt topologies to self-correct and execute complex code, terminal commands, web search queries, and email dispatches. Outfitted with safety sandboxes to prevent data loss while offering powerful execution capability.
autonomousAgent.helpPrompt: Type "help" to list instructions, or click quick tasks below.

multiAgent.title: Multi-Agent System
multiAgent.subtitle: A distributed system where specialized agents negotiate and review work to achieve high-quality results.
multiAgent.description: Instead of relying on a single generalist model, the Multi-Agent System breaks tasks down and assigns them to specialized agents: Researcher, Writer, and Critic. They collaborate via an asynchronous message-passing queue, debating drafts and correcting errors automatically before final output generation.
multiAgent.systemIdle: Multi-Agent Broker Idle. Awaiting collaboration trigger.

agenticRag.title: Agentic RAG & Memory Hub
agenticRag.subtitle: High recall semantic search database coupled with episodic agent memory layers.
agenticRag.description: This module acts as the long-term memory for our AI system. It implements hybrid keyword/vector search (RAG) using cosine similarity on high-dimensional text embeddings, alongside a persistent graph database that models semantic relationships, ensuring agents remember previous user interactions and domain files.
